# balena_device_env_var (Resource)

Manages a device-level environment variable.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "balena_device_env_var" "debug_mode" {
  device_uuid = "a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4"
  name        = "DEBUG"
  value       = "true"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `device_id` (Number) ID of the device.
- `name` (String) Variable name.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) Variable value.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Numeric identifier.
